attendancePayrollImpact.conclusion: Approved attendance impacts are consumed by preview/run/payslip snapshot once.

performancePromotion.conclusion: Approved recommendation updates employee salary, payroll preview, and rejects duplicate approval.

legacyVsEnterpriseLeave.legacyWarning: Legacy leave type was kept for compatibility and is ignored by enterprise payroll deductions unless mapped to an enterprise leave type.
legacyVsEnterpriseLeave.conclusion: Legacy unmapped leave is explicitly flagged as payroll-ignored; enterprise leave remains canonical payroll source.
